title: Integrated multi-omics analysis identifies prognostic risk genes and constructs a predictive signature in diffuse large B-cell lymphoma.
snippet: Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) presents a complex etiology and challenging diagnosis. This study aims to investigate potential pathogenic genes. We identified DLBCL risk genes (DRGs) through expression quantitative trait loci-Mendelian randomization (eQTL-MR). Gene Ontology (GO) and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) analyses were conduct...
